title: Sending Notifications to mobile phone
excerpt:
Aloha, 
I was wondering if anyone has managed to send notifications as texts to a mobile phone? That would be a GAME CHANGER for my team.

posts.author: cfraticelli (Celene Fraticelli)
posts.cookedHtml:
Aloha,

I was wondering if anyone has managed to send notifications as texts to a mobile phone? That would be a GAME CHANGER for my team.

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
What exactly do you mean with ‘manage to send notifications by text’?
The only way I know how to trigger a notification in an action in an item (by mentioning or assigning for example)

posts.author: cfraticelli (Celene Fraticelli)
posts.cookedHtml: I mean had anyone managed to find a way to use the API to get the notifications to send text messages to mobile phones.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
There is a very nice SMS integration with Twilio, is that what you are looking for?
